description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectilinear design with a flat roof and multiple interlocking volumes. The exterior is primarily composed of light gray and black surfaces, accented by brown and green landscaping elements, including what appear to be small trees and grassy areas. The structure includes several stepped terraces and patios, with a prominent open area at the front that may serve as a porch or entryway. Large window openings are visible, especially along the sides, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor connectivity. The rear of the bungalow is characterized by a more private, enclosed garden space with organized green strips, possibly for recreation or gardening. The overall layout is low and sprawling, typical of contemporary single-story residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with interlocking volumes, large windows, and landscaped terraces. The design features light gray, black, and brown tones with green garden areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, stepped terraces, and landscaped area with small trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile, flat roof, and a large green garden strip at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the organized garden layout, private outdoor space, and multiple window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side terraces, and additional landscaping.
